Package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element

Class Line

java.lang.Object
net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Keyed
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.AbstractElement<Line>
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.Line
All Implemented Interfaces:
Element, JsonSerializable
public class Line extends AbstractElement<Line>
Represents a line element.

      New line element

    • getEndPos

      @Nullable public Vec2 getEndPos()
      Get this line's end position from the end anchor position.

      If null, default end position 0,0 will be used.

      Returns:
      End position from end anchor

    • setEndPos

      @NotNull public Line setEndPos(float x, float y)
      Set this line's end position from the end anchor position.

      If null, default end position 0,0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      x - X (horizontal) end position
      y - Y (vertical) end position
      Returns:
      This line

    • setEndPos

      @NotNull public Line setEndPos(@Nullable Vec2 pos)
      Set this line's end position from the end anchor position.

      If null, default end position 0,0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      pos - End position
      Returns:
      This line

    • getEndAnchor

      @Nullable public Vec2 getEndAnchor()
      Get this line's end anchor position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      If null, default end anchor 0,0 will be used.

      Returns:
      End anchor position

    • setEndAnchor

      @NotNull public Line setEndAnchor(float x, float y)
      Set this line's end anchor position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      If null, default end anchor 0,0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      x - X (horizontal) end anchor
      y - Y (vertical) end anchor
      Returns:
      This line

    • setEndAnchor

      @NotNull public Line setEndAnchor(@Nullable Vec2 anchor)
      Set this line's end anchor position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      If null, default end anchor 0,0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      anchor - End anchor position
      Returns:
      This line

    • getEndOffset

      @Nullable public Vec2 getEndOffset()
      Get this line's end offset position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      If null, default end offset 0,0 will be used.

      Returns:
      End offset position

    • setEndOffset

      @NotNull public Line setEndOffset(float x, float y)
      Set this line's end offset position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      If null, default end offset 0,0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      x - X (horizontal) end offset
      y - Y (vertical) end offset
      Returns:
      This line

    • setEndOffset

      @NotNull public Line setEndOffset(@Nullable Vec2 offset)
      Set this line's end offset position on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      If null, default end offset 0,0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      offset - End offset position
      Returns:
      This line

    • getWidth

      @Nullable public Float getWidth()
      Get this line's width in scaled pixels.

      If null, default width 1.0 will be used.

      Returns:
      Line width

    • setWidth

      @NotNull public Line setWidth(@Nullable Float width)
      Set this line's width in scaled pixels.

      If null, default width 1.0 will be used.

      Parameters:
      width - Line width
      Returns:
      This line

      Parameters:
      color - Ending color
      Returns:
      This line

    • setColor

      @NotNull public Line setColor(int color)
      Set the color for this line.

      Both the start and end colors will be set to the specified color.

      Parameters:
      color - Line color
      Returns:
      This line
